name: SCHEME 1: A first-correct at seq 5, B clears at seq 20, C re-corrects at seq 40; owner stays A, NOT C
intent: This is THE case that pins scheme 1 (first-ever-correct) against scheme 2 (last-correct). Once the FIRST matching writer is assigned, no later clear or re-correction by anyone moves the owner. A scheme-2 reading would report C; scheme 1 reports A. owners are userIds only (INV-6).
